name: Meskhenet
description: Meskhenet was an ancient Egyptian goddess of childbirth, destiny, and the creation of the Ka (life-force). She was believed to be present at the moment of birth, where she would determine the fate of the newborn child. Meskhenet was not typically depicted in temples or as a primary object of worship, but her presence was crucial in the birthing process. She was often represented as a brick with a woman's head, referring to the brick upon which women squatted during childbirth. As a goddess of destiny, Meskhenet’s pronouncements were considered immutable, and she held immense influence over the life ahead. While not a major deity with extensive mythology, her role was fundamental to the continuation of life and the establishment of individual identity. She was associated with other birth-related deities like Taweret and Heket, often appearing alongside them in depictions of childbirth scenes. Her power lay in the moment of creation and the determination of destiny, making her a vital figure in Egyptian beliefs about life and death. The knowledge of Meskhenet and her importance was passed down through generations, primarily among midwives and families. She was not usually offered grand sacrifices, but rather simple offerings acknowledging her role during the crucial event of birth, ensuring a safe delivery and a favorable destiny for the child. Meskhenet's presence was invoked to protect both mother and child during this vulnerable time.
subtitle: Goddess of Birth and Destiny

keyMyths.title: The Determination of Fate
keyMyths.description: At the moment of birth, Meskhenet appears to determine the child's destiny, which is believed to be unchangeable. This fate influences the child's life from that moment onward.

keyMyths.title: Meskhenet's Brick
keyMyths.description: The birth brick, a symbol of Meskhenet, was used to support women during labor. It represents her presence and assistance in the birthing process, ensuring a safe delivery.
keyMyths.source: Archaeological evidence and ancient Egyptian art

keyMyths.title: Association with the Ka
keyMyths.description: Meskhenet is linked to the creation of the Ka, the life-force or spirit. Her presence at birth ensures the child receives its Ka, connecting them to the divine realm.

sources.author: Geraldine Pinch
